title: hpc-aggregate skill return envelope
description: Return envelope written by the hpc-aggregate sub-skill at <experiment_dir>/.hpc/_returns/hpc-aggregate.json. oneOf [Success, Error].

metrics_path.description: Local path of the materialized aggregated metrics artifact (e.g. results/metrics.json). Null when aggregate-flow did not produce a single canonical path.

allow_partial.description: Whether the aggregation proceeded with missing waves (the caller-resolved allow_partial flag).

missing_waves.description: When allow_partial=true, the wave ids that were missing; otherwise null.

decisions.description: Decision log entries the skill accumulated (e.g. 'proceeded past allow_partial=true').
